hooks.command: PLAN=$(ls docs/superpowers/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$PLAN" ]; then echo '❌ No plan file. Run /supergraph:plan first.'; exit 1; fi; DONE=$(grep -c '^- \[x\]' "$PLAN" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); TODO=$(grep -c '^- \[ \]' "$PLAN" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "📋 Plan: $(basename $PLAN) — $DONE done, $TODO remaining"
if command -v code-review-graph &>/dev/null; then code-review-graph update 2>/dev/null && echo '🔄 Graph updated.' || true; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|mkfs|dd if=|git push --force|git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM)'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: Destructive command.'; exit 1; fi

PLAN=$(ls docs/superpowers/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$PLAN" ]; then DONE=$(grep -c '^- \[x\]' "$PLAN" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); TODO=$(grep -c '^- \[ \]' "$PLAN" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ $((DONE+TODO)) -gt 0 ]; then echo "📊 Progress: $DONE/$((DONE+TODO)) tasks"; fi; if [ "$TODO" -eq 0 ] && [ "$DONE" -gt 0 ]; then echo '✅ All tasks done → /supergraph:fix → /supergraph:review'; fi; fi; DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$DIRTY" -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠️ $DIRTY uncommitted changes — test + commit."; fi
